_comment: Pinned AM May 2026 monthly compensation. Team target $100,000 (Joy $40k + Arundhati $35k + Deepak $25k). Team achievement $15,405 (15.4%) — well below the 60% manager-team floor, so Joy earns no base manager commission for May. Deepak joined the AM team mid-May (May quota $25k). Vivin remains off the roster (left the org in April).

reps.name: Joy
reps.manager_role_note: Joy is the AM manager. Her individual achievement ($9,176 booked / $6,800 received across 4 May deals) contributes to the overall team performance. However, her commission is calculated on the team's performance using the manager tier bands (60-80% → 2%, 81-99% → 3%, 100%+ → 4%) — not on her individual sales.

reps.name: Deepak
reps.joined_note: Deepak joined the AM team mid-May 2026. His May quota is $25,000.

paid_deals.deal_name: SKYTIDE GROUP - New Deal - Server Overage
Michigan Economic Development Co. - Overage - Box to MS365
ezCater - New Deal - Google Drive to OneDrive / SharePoint
SLR Consulting - Existing Customer - Server Overage
BeWell, New Mexico's Health Insurance Marketplace - New Deal - ShareFile to SharePoint Migration

unpaid_deals_overrides.deal_name: SLR Consulting - Slack to Teams - NEW Project
unpaid_deals_overrides.reason: Payment not received at the time of May commission calculation.

deals_summary.note: 7 deals closed in May 2026 for the AM team. 6 had payment received ($13,029 total) and 1 (SLR Consulting - Slack to Teams - NEW Project, Joy Prakash, $2,376) had no payment received at the time of May commission calculation.

commission.eligibility_text: Monthly plan: a minimum of 60% achievement of the individual quota is required for commission. Below 60% → 0% slab. Managed-deal incentive: 5% on managed deals (AM team only).

manager_incentive.rules_note: Manager commission applies only if the team achieves a minimum of 60% of the monthly target. May team achievement is 15.4% ($15,405 / $100,000), which is well below the 60% floor → Joy earns no base manager commission for May 2026.
manager_incentive.calculation_note: Team achievement 15.4% is below the 60% manager-team floor → base manager commission = $0 for May 2026.
